text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is approached by a group of
Umamusume while training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're none other than the three rising
stars—Inari One, Tamamo Cross, and Super
Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From an outside perspective, Oguri Cap and
Super Creek seem like they should be sworn
enemies, but the two of them don't seem to feel
as such.
